name: Blackstone Inc.
lede: Blackstone runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Gurugram, covering CoE and ssc, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Blackstone office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Blackstone Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Blackstone runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Gurugram), covering CoE and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Blackstone's India footprint covers Mumbai and Gurugram, spanning CoE and ssc. The centers deliver Finance & Accounting for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nineteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Blackstone operate in India?
faq.a: Blackstone operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Blackstone have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Blackstone's India GCC footprint spans Mumbai and Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Blackstone run in India?
faq.a: Blackstone runs CoE and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Blackstone's India GCCs?
faq.a: Blackstone's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Blackstone's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 19 leaders at Blackstone's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
